name: Zurich Rock 'n' Roll Madrid Marathon
summary: Full marathon through central Madrid, Casa de Campo, and back via the Manzanares riverfront, starting on Paseo de la Castellana and finishing on Paseo de Recoletos.
heroNote: Strong cheering spots on Paseo de la Castellana near the start, along Calle Mayor, and near the Paseo de Recoletos finish.
specialNote: The organization divides runners into multiple start corrals based on predicted finish time. The listed start time is for the first corral — your actual start may be later.
